title: GreenGold
description: This resource pack changes some textures. Mainly from the Hootbar and tools.
body:
This resource pack changes some textures. Mainly from the Hootbar and tools. It is mainly kept in the colors green and gold. However, it does not affect your gaming experience. On Minecraft Java.


---------------------------------------------
This resource pack changes these textures:

-Hotbar
-Heart
-Trapdoor
-Elytra
-Netherite Tools
-Netherite armor
-No Pumpkinblur
